SQL Query:
SELECT TOP 3 pc.Country, SUM(f.[Trade Value (US$)]) AS TotalTradeValue
        FROM FactTrade f
        INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
        WHERE 
            f.CreationDateKey = 20221231
            AND f.Is_Active = 'Y'
            AND rc.Country = 'Haiti'  -- Handle single quote in country name
            AND pc.Country <> 'World'
            AND [Trade Flow Code] = 2
        GROUP BY pc.Country
        ORDER BY TotalTradeValue DESC;

SQL Query:
SELECT TOP 3 pc.Country, SUM(f.[Trade Value (US$)]) AS TotalTradeValue
        FROM FactTrade f
        INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
        WHERE 
            f.CreationDateKey = 20221231
            AND f.Is_Active = 'Y'
            AND rc.Country = 'Kuwait'  -- Handle single quote in country name
            AND pc.Country <> 'World'
            AND [Trade Flow Code] = 2
        GROUP BY pc.Country
        ORDER BY TotalTradeValue DESC;

        INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
        WHERE 
            f.CreationDateKey = 20221231
            AND f.Is_Active = 'Y'
            AND rc.Country = 'Poland'  -- Handle single quote in country name
            AND pc.Country <> 'World'
            AND [Trade Flow Code] = 2
        GROUP BY pc.Country

SQL Query:
SELECT TOP 3 pc.Country, SUM(f.[Trade Value (US$)]) AS TotalTradeValue
        FROM FactTrade f
        INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
        WHERE 
            f.CreationDateKey = 20221231
            AND f.Is_Active = 'Y'
            AND rc.Country = 'Grenada'  -- Handle single quote in country name
            AND pc.Country <> 'World'
            AND [Trade Flow Code] = 2
        GROUP BY pc.Country
        ORDER BY TotalTradeValue DESC;

        INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
        WHERE 
            f.CreationDateKey = 20211231
            AND f.Is_Active = 'Y'
            AND rc.Country = 'Niger'  -- Handle single quote in country name

SQL Query:
SELECT TOP 3 pc.Country, SUM(f.[Trade Value (US$)]) AS TotalTradeValue
        FROM FactTrade f
        INNER JOIN DimCountry rc ON f.ReporterCountryId = rc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimCountry pc ON f.PartnerCountryId = pc.CountryID
        INNER JOIN DimProduct p ON f.ProductID = p.ProductID_SK
        WHERE 
            f.CreationDateKey = 20221231
            AND f.Is_Active = 'Y'
            AND rc.Country = 'Burkina Faso'  -- Handle single quote in country name
            AND pc.Country <> 'World'
            AND [Trade Flow Code] = 2
        GROUP BY pc.Country
        ORDER BY TotalTradeValue DESC;
